use_cases: Display animated hero text that vaporizes and cycles through multiple phrases
Create attention-grabbing headings with particle-based text dissolution effects
Use as a decorative text element for landing pages and marketing sites
Add dynamic text transitions to portfolio or creative project pages
Implement animated headers for SaaS product documentation or feature showcases
ai_summary: A dynamic text effect component that cycles through multiple text strings with a vaporize animation. Text breaks into particles that disperse and reform, creating a visually striking morph effect against a dark background. Configurable with custom fonts, colors, animation timing, and direction control. Ideal for hero sections and impactful text displays on any platform.
